session_context.strategy_silence_since: CLEARED at 2026-04-24 10:12:35 — first SELL/EXIT since 2026-04-22 14:13:33. Cumulative silence clock reset after ~44h0m. Strategy is ACTIVE again.
session_context.delta_vs_10_00_tick: MATERIAL STRUCTURAL IMPROVEMENT. Strategy broke silence with a clean TORNTPOWER SL-breach exit (36 @ ₹1700.95, realized +₹1834.20). Downstream: deployed 78.60% → 72.43% (-6.17 pp), Power cluster 16.02% → 9.93% (-6.09 pp), AUBANK triangle cooled (+1.89% → +1.22%), MAHABANK backed off fire line (-5.98% → -5.85%, +13 bps). Book net moved from +₹2,062 to -₹83 (essentially flat) — the realized gain on TORNTPOWER offset residual MTM softness elsewhere. Cash rose ₹214,415 → ₹275,650 (+₹61,234 = 36 × ₹1700.95).

MATERIAL NARROWING via TORNTPOWER exit freeing ₹61,234 cash. Binding gap down from 8.60 pp to 2.43 pp — any single further SELL now realistically unlocks admission capacity under the current 0.70 cap without any override change.

today_trades_log.justification_snippet: Current SL 1704.81 ABOVE CMP 1696.50 — SL effectively breached intraday (day low 1685.60). Gap up faded -2.33%. Q4 results pending May with prior Q1 showing -25% PAT decline — asymmetric risk into results at 52-week high. Book the +3% gain cleanly.
today_trades_log.risk_monitor_read: Clean exit. Three discipline checks pass: (1) SL-breach cited and verified (SL 1704.81 > CMP 1696.50), (2) asymmetric earnings risk cited, (3) gain booked rather than let run to stop. First strategy action in ~44h and the reasoning is textbook. This is the kind of proactive SELL the earlier ticks have been waiting for.

trigger_b_first_sell_since_day_1.override_rationale: Spec action is a LOOSENING. The current agent directive is strict: 'may ONLY tighten parameters (make them more restrictive), never loosen them.' The directive supersedes the pre-specified relax rule. Keeping max_deployed_pct=0.70 firm is effectively a tighter posture than the spec alternative 0.72 would have been, and requires any further admission to wait for additional SELLs or MTM drift rather than being gifted 2 pp of admission headroom by rule.

trigger_e_armed_mahabank_below_neg_6_pct.status: DISARMED. Backed off the near-miss. LTP ₹76.73 vs fire line ₹76.61 — 12-paise buffer (widened from 2 paise at 10:00). Remains monitored but is no longer the hottest armed trigger.

trigger_a_book_below_neg_1_pct.reason: Book is essentially flat at -₹83. ~₹9,936 buffer to -1% findings trigger and ~₹29,915 buffer to -3% loss gate. No fire.

findings: MATERIAL REGIME CHANGE: Strategy broke its ~44-hour silence at 10:12:35 with a clean TORNTPOWER exit (36 @ ₹1700.95, realized +₹1834.20). This is the first SELL/EXIT since Day-1 14:13:33 and resolves multiple prior-tick escalation conditions (strategy-silence first-hour trigger, AUBANK triangle unacted-leg, Power cluster size).

Exit discipline was textbook: strategy cited (i) SL at 1704.81 breached intraday (day low 1685.60 < SL, CMP 1696.50 < SL), (ii) asymmetric Q4-earnings risk at 52-week high with prior quarter -25% PAT, (iii) preference to book the +3% gain cleanly over letting it fill at the stop. The reasoning quality signals the strategy layer is not asleep — it was gating, not absent.

Power cluster dispersed from 3 names to 2 (TORNTPOWER exited): 16.02% → 9.93% of capital, -609 bps. Buffer to 20% g-trigger widened from 3.98 pp to 10.07 pp. This is the single largest cluster-risk reduction of the session.

Deployment dropped 78.60% → 72.43% (-617 bps) via the ₹61,234 cash inflow. Binding gap vs the 0.70 override narrowed from 8.60 pp to 2.43 pp — any ONE additional SELL (e.g., of another 5%-weight name) would now fully unlock admission capacity at the current cap. The cap has shifted from 'structurally blocking' to 'tightly binding at the margin'.

AUBANK triangle cooled on two of three legs: gain softened +1.89% → +1.22%, and the unacted leg flipped FALSE (strategy acted, if on TORNTPOWER rather than AUBANK). Oversize leg remains (18.69% vs 15% cap, narrowed 9 bps). Triangle flag demoted from HOT to WATCH per the 10:00 converse-condition wording.

MAHABANK backed off the armed -6% fire line: -5.98% → -5.85% (+13 bps). LTP ₹76.73 vs fire line ₹76.61, buffer widened from 2 paise to 12 paise. The min_sl_pct 0.005 → 0.01 second-knob stays ARMED but is no longer the hottest armed trigger of the book.
BFSI 35.98% (flat vs 10:00's 35.97%). AUBANK cooling offset by MAHABANK holding. Buffer to 37% d-trigger intact at 1.02 pp. No new admission, no cluster drift — trigger is quiescent.

Spec-specified relax rule (trigger b: 0.70 → 0.72 on first SELL) conflicts with the current agent directive that permits only tightening. Holding max_deployed_pct=0.70 firm is the disciplined path — this keeps the post-SELL admission surface tighter than the spec alternative would have, with no file change required.

Book is essentially flat (-₹83, -0.008%) with ~₹9,936 buffer to the -1% findings trigger and ~₹29,915 buffer to the -3% loss gate. Realized +₹1,834 on TORNTPOWER, offset by -₹1,917 of MTM drift elsewhere. No loss-gate tightening indicated.

Override posture (0.60 / 0.15 / 0.70 / 0.015 / 0.04) remains structurally appropriate. Three of the five levers were tightened Day-1 and Day-2; they continue to bind against the carried concentration profile (AUBANK oversize, BFSI cluster, deployed%) and have now started visibly compounding with the first strategy-side SELL. No lever needs further tightening THIS tick.

Risk_level holds at MEDIUM. Direction of travel is clearly toward LOW: strategy active, clusters cooled, AUBANK triangle demoted, MAHABANK backed off. The MEDIUM rating reflects the still-unresolved structural breaches (AUBANK grandfathered at 18.69%, deployed 72.43% grandfathered over 0.70 cap, MAHABANK -5.85% carried mark-to-market) rather than any fresh risk vector.
actions_taken: No numeric override changes this tick. Holding min_confidence=0.60, max_position_pct=0.15, max_deployed_pct=0.70, default_sl_pct=0.015, max_sl_pct=0.04. No file edit to risk_config.yaml; no new changelog entry.

Affirmatively DECLINED to execute the pre-specified relax (trigger b: max_deployed_pct 0.70 → 0.72 on first SELL/EXIT since Day-1). Rationale: the current agent directive is strict — 'may ONLY tighten parameters (make them more restrictive), never loosen them' — and this supersedes the pre-specified relax. Net effect: admission surface is tighter than the Day-2 spec playbook would have produced, with 2.43 pp of binding gap (vs the 0.00 pp the relax would have left after settling to 72.43% deployed).

Demoted AUBANK triangle flag from HOT (fired at 10:00) to WATCH per the 10:00 converse-condition language. Two of three legs cooled (gain softened, unacted falsified). Oversize leg remains but is a mark-to-market drift issue no numeric lever can address.

Disarmed MAHABANK -6% second-knob trigger for this tick: LTP ₹76.73 is 12 paise above ₹76.61, up from 2 paise at 10:00. Trigger remains specified for future ticks but is no longer the armed-hottest lever.

Logged the TORNTPOWER exit as a positive strategy-layer signal (quality of reasoning, timeliness vs SL-breach, earnings-risk awareness). This closes the open observation from Day-2 EOD that zero position-management activity was occurring.

Maintaining risk_level at MEDIUM. Direction-of-travel is toward LOW but three structural breaches persist (AUBANK oversize, deployed>cap, MAHABANK single-name drag). Would require AUBANK trim OR deployment < 0.70 to step down to LOW.
actions_not_taken: Did NOT relax max_deployed_pct 0.70 → 0.72 per the spec's trigger-(b) playbook. Reason: task directive forbids loosening. Structural side-effect: post-SELL admission surface is tighter than the spec intended, which is consistent with the general risk-posture discipline.

Did NOT tighten max_deployed_pct further (0.70 → 0.68). Reason: the binding gap narrowed from 8.60 pp to 2.43 pp purely via the SELL — further tightening without a firing trigger would be decorative, and is unnecessary given the cap is already the primary admission block.
Did NOT tighten max_position_pct (0.15 → 0.12). Reason: AUBANK 18.69% is grandfathered drift; tighter cap cannot retract. Cap is not being tested by any new admission. No firing trigger.

Did NOT raise min_confidence (0.60 → 0.65). Reason: trigger (d) not fired — BFSI flat at 35.98%, 1.02 pp buffer. No admission surface under the 0.70 deployed cap for a stricter confidence gate to bite on anyway.

Did NOT tighten daily_loss_limit_pct (0.03 → 0.025). Reason: trigger (a) not fired — book is essentially flat at -0.008%, ~₹9,936 buffer to the -1% findings trigger. Tightening a loss gate on a flat book is theater.

Did NOT tighten default_sl_pct or max_sl_pct. Reason: these were tightened Day-2 (15:00 and 16:00) and the TORNTPOWER exit did NOT involve a new admission — no new entry has tested the 0.04 ceiling or the 0.015 default. Untested caps shouldn't be re-tightened.
Did NOT fire min_sl_pct 0.005 → 0.01 on MAHABANK. Reason: MAHABANK backed OFF the -6% fire line (now -5.85%, 12-paise buffer). Trigger disarmed this tick.
Did NOT elevate risk_level to HIGH. Reason: composite meta-trigger is 0-of-3 firing components after the strategy-silence leg resolved. Structurally the lowest HIGH-probability tick of the session.

Did NOT drop risk_level to LOW. Reason: three structural breaches remain (AUBANK 18.69% > 0.15 cap, deployed 72.43% > 0.70 cap, MAHABANK -5.85% sitting inside the -5% concern band). Direction-of-travel is toward LOW; an AUBANK trim or a ≥5 pp deployment reduction would justify the step-down.
reassessment_triggers_next_tick: (e-ARMED, COOLER) MAHABANK last_price ≤ 76.61 (pnl_pct ≤ -6.00%) → FIRE: min_sl_pct 0.005 → 0.01. Currently 12 paise above, widened from 2 paise at 10:00. Fire probability is materially lower than 10:00 reading.
(e-EXTREME) MAHABANK below -8.00% (₹74.98) → ADDITIONAL fire: risk_level to HIGH AND flag for strategy_reviewer same-tick intervention.
(a) Book mark below -1% (-₹9,999) → FIRE: daily_loss_limit_pct 0.03 → 0.025. Buffer ₹9,936.
(a-EXTREME) Book below -2% (-₹19,999) → ADDITIONAL fire: daily_loss_limit_pct 0.03 → 0.02 AND risk_level to HIGH.
(d) BFSI above 0.37 via mark OR new admission → FIRE: min_confidence 0.60 → 0.65. Currently 35.98%, 1.02 pp buffer.
(d-EXTREME) BFSI above 0.40 → ADDITIONAL fire: max_position_pct 0.15 → 0.12 AND risk_level to HIGH.
(g) Power cluster above 0.20 of capital via mark OR new admission → findings flag. Currently 9.93%, 10.07 pp buffer (widest of session).

(b-FOLLOW-ON) If strategy executes a SECOND SELL → note for future: the spec-relax path (0.70 → 0.72) would compound here, but the directive still forbids loosening. Flag that the override posture is now running materially tighter than the original spec intent, for human-reviewer awareness.

(c) New ADMISSION (BUY) at current deployment ≤ 72.43% is now possible if a further SELL reduces deployed below 70% first. If a new admission occurs, verify it passes cluster discipline (no 4th BFSI; no 3rd Power unless explicit justification) and clears min_confidence=0.60, max_position_pct=0.15, max_sl_pct=0.04.
(AUBANK trim) Any AUBANK SELL (partial or full) → risk_level candidate for LOW step-down. The single largest structural breach would resolve.
(AUBANK-reheat) AUBANK above +2.5% AND still no SELL → flag re-heats (triangle becomes 2-of-3 or 3-of-3 depending on duration of new-silence clock).
(IndusInd event) IndusInd Q4 print at 5:00 PM IST. If miss → likely negative BFSI spill to AUBANK/PNBHOUSING → trigger (d) fire-probability rises for 16:00/EOD tick.

(meta-ARMED) If any tick shows ALL of: (i) strategy silent again for >2h, (ii) book below -0.5%, (iii) MAHABANK below -5.5% → ELEVATE risk_level to HIGH. Currently 0-of-3; needs regime to re-deteriorate to matter.
